name: Pinata
description: List, retrieve, delete, and pin existing IPFS content by CID on Pinata's public or private IPFS network.

auth.hint: Generate a Pinata API JWT (with appropriate org:files scopes) from the Pinata dashboard and send it as Authorization: Bearer <YOUR_PINATA_JWT>.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List pinned files on a network, with optional filters.

params.name: network
params.description: Target IPFS network: public or private.

params.name: order
params.description: Sort by creation date: ASC or DESC.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Pagination token from a previous response's nextPageToken.

tools.name: get_file
tools.description: Get details for a specific pinned file by its ID.

params.name: network
params.description: Target IPFS network: public or private.

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete (unpin) a file by its ID.

params.name: network
params.description: Target IPFS network: public or private.

tools.name: pin_by_cid
tools.description: Pin existing IPFS content to Pinata by its CID, without uploading binary data.

params.name: cid
params.description: CID of the existing IPFS content to pin.

params.name: name
params.description: Custom name for the pinned file.

params.name: group_id
params.description: ID of the group to associate the pinned file with.

params.name: host_nodes
params.description: Optional array of host node IDs to help locate the content.
